overall.description: Game footage from a truck driving simulator showing a first-person cabin view of a Mercedes truck navigating through heavy snowfall in an urban environment. The truck stops at a traffic light, turns right at an intersection, follows a Volvo tanker truck, and makes a left turn while snow accumulates on the windshield and wipers operate continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered multi-lane urban arterial road approaching intersection

events.description: truck comes to a complete stop at red traffic light at the intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through heavy snowfall on a multi-lane road, slowing down to stop at the intersection

notable_agents.action: box truck driving ahead in the same lane, also slowing to stop for the red light

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt road covered in snow with visible lane markings and snow banks on sides
horizontal traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red
low-rise commercial structures with flat roofs covered in snow
line of deciduous trees with heavy snow accumulation on branches

segments.scene_description: The truck drives through heavy snowfall on a wide urban arterial road, approaching a traffic intersection. The windshield wipers work continuously to clear accumulating snow as the truck slows down and comes to a stop at a red light, with a box truck visible ahead also waiting at the signal.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection waiting area at red light

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, signaling permission to proceed

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light with engine idling, waiting for the traffic signal to change

notable_agents.action: box truck stopped ahead at the intersection, waiting for the light

entered.detail: blue directional road sign with white text visible on the right side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The truck remains stationary at the red light while heavy snow continues to fall and accumulate on the windshield. The driver waits as the traffic signal changes to green, with a blue road sign becoming clearly visible on the right side of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with mixed buildings

events.description: truck begins right turn at the intersection, following the lane curvature
truck falls in behind a black Volvo tanker truck and follows it through the street

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the stop, executing a right turn at the intersection, and following a Volvo tanker truck through the snowy urban streets

notable_agents.action: black Volvo tanker truck driving ahead in the same lane, being followed by the ego vehicle

entered.detail: tall modern lamp posts lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: After the light turns green, the truck accelerates and makes a right turn at the intersection, falling in behind a black Volvo tanker truck. The truck continues driving down a snow-covered urban street lined with commercial buildings and street lights, maintaining a steady following distance behind the tanker.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved residential street with apartment buildings

events.description: truck initiates left turn onto a curved road, leaving the main commercial street

agents.ego_description: making a left turn onto a curved road, navigating through the snow-covered intersection

entered.detail: snow-covered curved road bending to the left with fresh tire tracks visible
multi-story apartment buildings with snow-covered roofs and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The truck makes a left turn onto a curved road, leaving the commercial district and the Volvo tanker behind. The scene transitions to a more residential area with apartment buildings and snow-covered trees lining the curved street as the truck continues navigating through the heavy snowfall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a heavy snowstorm, moving from a busy urban intersection into a quieter residential district. It begins with the truck slowing to a stop at a red light on a wide arterial road, where windshield wipers work continuously to clear the accumulating snow while a box truck waits ahead. As the signal turns green, the camera captures a blue road sign to the right before the truck accelerates and makes a right turn, following a black Volvo tanker down a snow-covered street lined with commercial buildings. The scene then shifts as the truck makes a left turn onto a curved road, leaving the tanker and the commercial district behind. Finally, the environment transitions into a residential area characterized by apartment buildings and snow-laden trees under the persistent snowfall.
